I've tried other coffees, Vitamin B supplements, diet changes, exercise, and nothing has worked well. Enter Four Sigmatic coffee.

After the second day of trying this coffee, I knew I couldn't live without it. I feel like myself again. I am thinking faster and clearer, I have energy that lasts well past my day job, and I'm showing up to work wearing pants again. I am cognitively me again and it feels so good I could cry.

review_title: Mushroom Coffee Mix Delicious and Energizing

In fact, this coffee is delicious!! I was sitting in a meeting at work with a cup in hand and my colleague leaned over and said, "Your coffee smells amazing!" I have consumed two pounds of it and I have to say that I do feel a difference. I go to the gym at 5:30 a.m. before going to work at 8 a.m. I used to have a cup of coffee before the gym and take one to work. Now I have one before the gym and it energizes me immediately. And I am truly not a morning person. It carries me through so that I don't feel that I need another cup. Additionally I am finding more clarity and focus during my day. I did order the single packets and have them in my desk drawer for those days when you need a 3 p.m. pick me up. While it's expensive for a pound of coffee, as a coffee junkie, I say give it a try and see how it makes you feel. Five stars!

I absolutely am in love with this company and with this coffee. I love Four Sigmatic's obvious commitment to quality and that the coffee is fair trade and organic. Also, it is simply delicious! I have been using this one in my regular automatic coffee maker. The bag suggested 3 tbsp per cup of water. It tastes great, but very strong if you use 3, so personally I've been using 2-2 1/2 tbsp per cup. This is honestly my new favorite coffee. I'm addicted to mushrooms in all their glorious forms and I think the idea of mushroom coffee is so cool. Also, I believe in the health benefits of mushroom extract it so why not put them in everything! They have created a unique, high quality product that makes me want to remain a loyal customer to them and spread the word. Side note: I also love the "Mushroom Academy" on their website where you can learn about mushrooms.

Ok so I knew it would taste great, because I've never tried anything I didn't like from Four Sigmatic, but I use a French press to make coffee. And you're supposed to use course ground coffee (need a special grinder) so I was a little skeptical about putting the ground shroom coffee in the French press, but it worked well! Tasted so smooth, and I absolutely love that this coffee doesn't make me jittery or sweaty (weird, I know) like regular coffee.
This is the only coffee I will buy from now on. I drink probably 1/4 of what I used to and I don't get the old crash. I don't have to feel guilty for loving coffee anymore!

review_title: Everything I Want in One Cup
review_content: I LOVE Coffee...and even more, I LOVE Mushrooms! I've been using various mushroom extracts for about 4 years now. I'm an endurance cyclist, so I'm basically in a constant state of energizing and recovery. I use Cordyceps mostly for stimulation before a ride and then Reishi, Lion's Mane and Chaga during recovery. Believe it or not, Coffee is also known to be quite helpful in fitness/muscle recovery as well! All that said, I began drinking Four Sigmatic's instant version of their Lion's Mane & Chaga Coffee about a year ago and fell in love with it. While I'm more interested in a full-bodied, bold tasting coffee, it was fine but didn't fully satisfy my rather finicky tastebuds for great coffee. So when I first saw the email that they came out with a ground version...certified organic...and in DARK ROAST, I nearly had a heart attack and immediately ordered a bag! Since I'm a bit of a 'coffee snob', I like to brew it slowly to release the full flavor. I either do a pour-over or brew it through an Espresso machine. When my first bag came in, I immediately opened it up and took a big smell of this beautiful coffee; that alone woke up all of my senses. I measured out 3 Tbsp (as instructed) and added it to my pour-over filter. Then I slowly poured just enough boiled water on the grounds to soak them and allow it to sit for about 30 seconds to get the first 'release' of the grounds. I follow that by slowly pouring the boiled water all over the grounds. After another 30 seconds, I take a small teaspoon and slowly stir the grounds with the water to make sure there are no weak spots. The indication of a nice, thick Crema is a great sign that this Coffee is going to be amazing! It's bold, robust and slightly earthy; a definite upgrade to the instant packet version which I was drinking previously. Two thumbs up! Five stars! If you haven't tried Mushroom Coffee, give it a shot.

I am not normally a coffee drinker, the taste just doesn’t appeal to me, but I also enjoy a hot drink in the morning. The mushroom coffee takes away the bitterness of normal coffee and delicious smooth undertones :)
